messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0111",
  "title": "图表描述：",
  "page_index": 33,
  "page_range": "33"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0112",
    "title": "1. **图表类型**：",
    "page_range": "33",
    "summary": "This section identifies the figure as a line chart and defines its primary function. It can answer retrieval questions regarding:\n- **Figure/Entity Type:** What specific chart type is presented? (Line chart)\n- **Definition/Claim:** What is the purpose of this chart type? (To visualize data trends over time)\n- **Topic:** How are temporal data trends represented in visualizations?\nThe section does not contain specific dates, procedures, metrics, tables, or evidence types."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0113",
    "title": "2. **图例说明**：",
    "page_range": "33-32",
    "summary": "This section serves as a figure legend, designed to answer questions about chart visualization and server data segmentation. It defines:\n- **Figures & Visual Mappings**: What the cyan-green area, blue line, yellow line, and orange line represent in the associated chart.\n- **Entities & Metrics**: The specific data series tracked: \"三服合计\" (aggregated total of all three servers), \"国服（仅App Store）\" (Chinese server data restricted to the App Store), \"繁中服\" (Traditional Chinese server data), and \"日服\" (Japanese server data).\n- **Definitions**: How combined totals are visually distinguished from individual regional/platform-specific metrics in the graph.\nThe section contains no dates, procedures, claims, or evidence types, focusing exclusively on decoding the chart key and its corresponding server metrics."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0114",
    "title": "3. **数据趋势分析**：",
    "page_range": "32",
    "summary": "本节提供数据趋势分析，基于颜色编码的折线图数据，涵盖7月中旬至12月底的指标变化。可回答以下检索问题：\n- **实体与指标**：三服合计、国服（仅App Store）、繁中服、日服的数值走势。\n- **关键时间**：7月中旬（全量峰值期）、12月底（期末低点）。\n- **核心数据**：三服合计峰值约1,600（期末约200）；繁中服峰值约800（期末约100）；国服峰值约400（期末约100）；日服峰值约400（期末约50）。\n- **趋势与波动声明**：7月中旬前各服数值较低且平稳；7月中旬后同步冲高并持续回落。繁中服波动显著大于其他三服；各服上升趋势与“三服合计”高度同步。\n- **证据类型**：折线图数据（青绿色区域、蓝/黄/橙色折线）。\n适用于查询各服务器峰值/谷值、时间拐点、波动性对比及图表数据解读。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0115",
    "title": "4. **关键时间节点**：",
    "page_range": "32",
    "summary": "This section outlines key temporal milestones in data performance trends and can answer retrieval queries regarding:\n- **Topics:** Data trend analysis and critical performance time nodes.\n- **Dates:** Mid-July (peak period) and end of December (lowest point).\n- **Entities:** “三服合计” (Three servers combined), “繁中服” (Traditional Chinese server), and all tracked data categories.\n- **Claims:** The overall data trajectory is downward; metrics universally peak in mid-July and bottom out in late December.\n- **Metrics:** Temporal extremes (maximum and minimum values) across all monitored categories.\n- **Evidence Types:** Observational data trends and temporal performance analysis.\n- **Definitions/Procedures/Tables/Figures:** Not present in this section.\nThe text provides a high-level timeline of performance extremes and directional trends without specifying exact numerical values or underlying causes."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0116",
    "title": "5. **总结**：",
    "page_range": "32-1",
    "summary": "This section summarizes comparative performance trends for regional game server metrics from mid-July to late December. It addresses retrieval queries regarding: **Topics & Entities**: Performance analysis of “三服合计” (combined three servers), “国服（仅App Store）” (China App Store server), “日服” (Japan server), and “繁中服” (Traditional Chinese server). **Dates & Timeframes**: Peak timing (mid-July for combined servers) and trough timing (late December for all categories). **Claims & Metrics**: Overall downward trajectory across all categories; CN and JP servers exhibit relatively low, stable values; Traditional Chinese server shows high volatility. **Evidence & Figures**: Conclusions are derived from a referenced chart/figure independently researched and visualized by 点点数据 (DianDian Data). The section provides direct answers on metric fluctuation patterns, regional stability comparisons, and year-end decline trends."
  }
]

message.content:
This section provides a comprehensive description and analytical summary of a line chart tracking regional game server performance metrics from mid-July to late December. It covers:
- **Topics & Figures:** Chart description and temporal data trend analysis using a line chart.
- **Definitions & Legend:** Visual mappings for a cyan-green area and blue, yellow, and orange lines, defining how aggregated totals are distinguished from individual regional/platform-specific metrics.
- **Entities & Metrics:** Tracks four primary entities: “三服合计” (combined three servers), “国服（仅App Store）” (China App Store server), “繁中服” (Traditional Chinese server), and “日服” (Japanese server). Key metrics include temporal extremes: combined total (~1,600 peak to ~200 trough), Traditional Chinese (~800 to ~100), China (~400 to ~100), and Japan (~400 to ~50).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Highlights mid-July as the universal peak period and late December as the lowest point/trough.
- **Claims & Trends:** Asserts a consistent downward trajectory across all categories. Metrics were low and stable prior to mid-July, surged synchronously, and then continuously declined. The Traditional Chinese server exhibits significantly higher volatility than the relatively stable China and Japan servers, with all individual trends closely aligning with the combined total.
- **Evidence Types:** Conclusions are derived from observational line chart data independently researched and visualized by 点点数据 (DianDian Data). No tables or procedures are present in this section.

response_text:
This section provides a comprehensive description and analytical summary of a line chart tracking regional game server performance metrics from mid-July to late December. It covers:
- **Topics & Figures:** Chart description and temporal data trend analysis using a line chart.
- **Definitions & Legend:** Visual mappings for a cyan-green area and blue, yellow, and orange lines, defining how aggregated totals are distinguished from individual regional/platform-specific metrics.
- **Entities & Metrics:** Tracks four primary entities: “三服合计” (combined three servers), “国服（仅App Store）” (China App Store server), “繁中服” (Traditional Chinese server), and “日服” (Japanese server). Key metrics include temporal extremes: combined total (~1,600 peak to ~200 trough), Traditional Chinese (~800 to ~100), China (~400 to ~100), and Japan (~400 to ~50).
- **Dates & Timeframes:** Highlights mid-July as the universal peak period and late December as the lowest point/trough.
- **Claims & Trends:** Asserts a consistent downward trajectory across all categories. Metrics were low and stable prior to mid-July, surged synchronously, and then continuously declined. The Traditional Chinese server exhibits significantly higher volatility than the relatively stable China and Japan servers, with all individual trends closely aligning with the combined total.
- **Evidence Types:** Conclusions are derived from observational line chart data independently researched and visualized by 点点数据 (DianDian Data). No tables or procedures are present in this section.
